news.paragraph: Semiconductor ETF SMH is showing some weakness as oil prices surge and Nvidia, a major holding, wavers ahead of its earnings report. The options market has also flashed an ominous signal regarding Nvidia's upcoming earnings, adding to the uncertainty. Traders should monitor Nvidia's price action and any broader market sentiment shifts as potential catalysts.

headlines.title: Dow Jones Futures Fall As Oil Prices Top $100; Nvidia Wavers, Walmart Falls, SpaceX Files For Huge IPO
The options market is flashing an ominous sign about Nvidia’s looming earnings
